Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, 180 degree tilt

memory.slots: 2 sockets available (8MB in system; 8MB on memory module with 2 SO-DIMM sockets)
memory.features: 16MB standard (Windows 95) / 32MB standard (Windows NT); memory module under disk, accessible by opening keyboard

display_options: 12.1" TFT SVGA color 800x600, 65,536 simultaneous colors, Black Matrix TFT, 100 to 1 contrast ratio

storage.hdd: 2.1 GB / 13 ms / DMA Mode 2 or PIO Mode 4, EIDE, busmaster, PCI 2.1, supports two internal disks (max 10.2 GB)
storage.optical: None standard / can upgrade to 4x, 6x, 8x, or 8-20x CD-ROM via UltraBay

ports: 2 x Type I/II or 1 x Type III PCMCIA (CardBus 32-bit PCI)
Infrared ports (front and back) with IrDA 1.0, up to 115 kbs
audio: 16-bit audio chip, 20 voice MIDI FM synthesis (ESS1688)
Internal stereo speakers (0.5W), slide volume control, internal microphone
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard, automated tilt up (5.5 degrees)
security: Security latch for keyboard and DIMMs (requires Kensington)
